minimum_required_sections.core_function: What communication task this grammar performs.
minimum_required_sections.when_not_to_use: At least 3 invalid or unnatural contexts.
minimum_required_sections.word_order_logic: Why the parts appear in this order.
minimum_required_sections.contrast_with_known_grammar: Compare against at least 1 older structure.
minimum_required_sections.english_contrast: Explain why direct English mapping may fail.
minimum_required_sections.correct_examples: At least 8 examples using only known vocab.
minimum_required_sections.incorrect_examples: At least 5 examples with clear correction.
minimum_required_sections.error_feedback_map: Specific feedback for predictable learner mistakes.
